reviews.comment:
el parador es muy apacible pero para el volumen de gente que manejan y lo que facturan podrian poner mas empleados 10minutos para que te cobren una gaseosa y unas galletitas es mucho.

(Translated by Google)
The inn is very peaceful, but for the volume of people they handle and what they charge, they could put more employees on. 10 minutes to get charged for a soda and some cookies is a lot.
